sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 51:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 51:1
items.html: Phase four is called Sof [end], or Sium [conclusion] because it stops the upper light from expanding to it, and therefore ends the degree.
